message:
refactor(cx): enforce capability constraints on entropy methods and simplify SubsetOf trait

Capability system (cx/cap.rs):
- Remove generic_const_exprs-dependent SubsetOf blanket impl that required
  nightly Rust, replacing it with concrete impls for common capability
  set pairs (None ⊆ All, All ⊆ All) to keep the crate on stable Rust
- Simplify doc comment for SubsetOf trait

Context (cx/cx.rs):
- Add `where Caps: cap::HasRandom` bounds to all entropy/random methods
  (entropy(), random_u64(), random_bytes(), random_usize(), random_bool(),
  random_f64()) so callers without the Random capability get a compile-time
  error instead of a runtime one — this is the whole point of the capability
  type system

Scope (cx/scope.rs):
- Adjust scope narrowing logic to align with simplified SubsetOf impls

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
